Another boring %s: After a careful analysis of your surroundings, you conclude you are at the bottom of a pile of garbage!
又是無聊的 %s: 仔細分析一番周遭環境後，你得出結論：你在一堆垃圾的最底層！

Another boring %s: Willing to do anything to further tonight's goal, you dive into the dirty dumpster.
又是無聊的 %s: 為了今晚的目標，你什麼都豁出去了，一頭栽進髒兮兮的垃圾桶。

Another boring %s: Digging past innumerable limp celery stalks from this morning's bloody marys, you find Lefty's hammer, wipe it off as much as you can, and stuff it into your pants pocket.
又是無聊的 %s: 翻過今早調血腥瑪麗剩下的無數根軟趴趴芹菜梗，你挖出老左的錘子，盡量擦乾淨，塞進褲子口袋。

Another boring %s: You carefully tie the ribbon from your "nuptial bed" around your waist.
又是無聊的 %s: 你小心把那條「洞房」緞帶綁在腰上。

Another boring %s: You carefully tie the ribbon from your "nuptial bed" around the railing.
又是無聊的 %s: 你小心把那條「洞房」緞帶綁在欄杆上。

Another boring %s: With the coy pink ribbon rather insecurely holding you to the railing, you can reach all the way over to the window.
又是無聊的 %s: 那條嬌羞的粉紅緞帶，搖搖晃晃地把你繫在欄杆上，總算讓你搆得到那扇窗。
